lede: A look at June 8 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Francesca Capaldi and Kelli Williams, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: Donald Trump
events.desc: Former US President Donald Trump is indicted on federal charges of misusing classified information.

events.title: Vietnam War
events.desc: Vietnam War: Nine-year-old Phan Thị Kim Phúc is burned by napalm, an event captured by Associated Press photographer Nick Ut moments later while the young girl is seen running naked down a road, in what would become an iconic, Pulitzer Prize-winning photo.

events.title: Six-Day War
events.desc: Six-Day War: The USS Liberty incident: A United States Navy spy ship is attacked by the Israeli Air Force and Navy, resulting in 34 deaths and 171 wounded.

events.title: 1953 Flint–Beecher tornado
events.desc: An F5 tornado hits Beecher, Michigan, United States, killing 116, injuring 844, and destroying 340 homes.

events.title: World War II
events.desc: World War II: The completion of Operation Alphabet, the evacuation of Allied forces from Narvik at the end of the Norwegian campaign.

events.title: Margaret Bondfield
events.desc: Margaret Bondfield is appointed Minister of Labour. She is the first woman appointed to the Cabinet of the United Kingdom.

events.title: Franz Joseph I
events.desc: Coronation of Franz Joseph as King of Hungary following the Austro-Hungarian compromise (Ausgleich).

events.title: American Civil War
events.desc: American Civil War: Tennessee secedes from the Union.

events.title: Laki
events.desc: Laki, a volcano in Iceland, begins an eight-month eruption which kills over 9,000 people and starts a seven-year famine.

events.title: American Revolutionary War
events.desc: American Revolutionary War: Continental Army attackers are driven back at the Battle of Trois-Rivières.

deaths.text: Ramoji Rao, Indian businessman, media proprietor and film producer
Ghassan Tueni, Lebanese journalist, academic, and politician
Juan Carlos Onganía, Argentine general and politician, 35th President of Argentina
George Gordon, 2nd Earl of Huntly, Earl of Huntly and Lord Chancellor of Scotland

observances.text: Christian feast day: Blessed Mary of the Divine Heart (Droste zu Vischering)
